description: User picks a refund in free text (not via the card): the agent calls the gated refund_customer tool with the saved order id, which pauses for human approval — it must NOT claim the refund is done, and no workflow fires in the same turn. (Updated 2026-07-15 when the refund branch moved from set_metadata+SLA to the gated tool; the eval caught the prompt change, as designed.)
